suite.name: Perfect 13 Pass

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=voting, url=http://127.0.0.1:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/ path_url=/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
${resp} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.msg: Argument types are: <class 'int'> <class 'str'>
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
